analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that the Council of the European Union reaffirmed sanctions against Qasem Soleimani for involvement in terrorist acts. It is informational about EU actions, not the US. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – not promoted; no reference to US values or history. US2 (admirable society) – not promoted; no mention of US society or groups. US3 (US has hostile enemies) – while Soleimani is labeled involved in terrorism, the tweet attributes action to the EU and does not frame threats specifically to the US or as US adversaries; thus not applicable. US4 (US as force for good) – not promoted; focuses on EU sanctions, not US support for rights/peace. US5 (great international ally) – not promoted; no praise of US alliances. US6 (forefront) – not promoted; no claim of US leadership. Conclusion: No listed US narratives are promoted.
